ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "week_ending" TEXT /* Date of the week ending */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the data was observed */,
  "observed_number" INTEGER /* Number of observed cases or metrics */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the observed number */,
  "exceeds_threshold" INTEGER /* Indicates if the observed number exceeds the threshold */,
  "excess" INTEGER /* Amount by which the observed number exceeds the threshold */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "health_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health type associated with the data */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome associated with the data */,
  "suppression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suppression measure applied to the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_health_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_type_id") REFERENCES health_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_suppression_id FOREIGN KEY ("suppression_id") REFERENCES suppressions ("suppress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state name */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Southeast, Northeast) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., Hospital Admissions) */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* The threshold value for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "excess_records" (
  "excess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each excess record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health data entry associated with the excess */,
  "total_excess_2020" INTEGER /* Total excess recorded in the year 2020 */,
  "percent_excess" REAL /* Percent excess compared to the threshold */,
  "excess_type" TEXT /* Type of excess (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the excess record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the excess record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("excess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_excess_records_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., Infectious Disease, Chronic Illness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health metric type (e.g., communicable, non-communicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome (e.g., Increased Hospitalizations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppressions" (
  "suppress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suppression entry */,
  "suppress_type" TEXT /* Type of suppression (e.g., None, Partial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the suppression measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suppression was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suppression was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suppress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "total_observed" INTEGER /* Total number of observed cases over the year */,
  "average_excess" REAL /* Average excess over the threshold for the year */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health data entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Warning, Critical) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, public health official, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health organization */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., data sharing, joint research) */,
  "collaboration_data" TEXT /* Data related to the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the health organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., hospital, public health department) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)
